description: When the daemon spawns an agent, configure it to connect to the ao CLI's built-in MCP server. The MCP server endpoint and tool scoping should be derived from the agent's profile mcp_servers config. Extend the existing apply_native_mcp_policy in agent-runner/src/runner/process.rs to read tool_policy from the agent profile and pass appropriate tool prefix filters. The ao MCP server already exists (llm-mcp-server crate) — this task wires it into the spawn flow based on profile config.
title: Wire built-in ao MCP server into agent spawning with per-profile tool scoping
